items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Fever vs Dream: 

-Early pace
-Kelsey Mitchell with difficulty
-Gross defensive stretches
-Sophie Cunningham won't miss
-Quick 10-point swings
-Trading buckets
-Foul trouble for Caitlin Clark
-Aliyah Boston in the fourth
-Runs and crowds
-Poor finishes

More: www.circlecityspin.com/fever-defens...
